title: Habit Tracker — All-in-One Notion Template
description:
Stop letting your habits fall apart after week two. This Notion Habit Tracker gives you a complete, beautifully structured workspace to build lasting routines — without juggling five different apps.

Define your habits, log completions daily, track streaks automatically, and link every habit to a bigger life goal — all inside Notion. Whether you're a remote worker optimizing your morning routine, a student building study habits, or someone on a wellness journey, this template adapts to your life.

Inside you get five interconnected databases (Habits, Daily Log, Goals, Weekly Reviews, and Streak Snapshots) plus seven pre-built pages including a Dashboard, Daily Check-In, Analytics view, and a full Setup Guide. Streak calculations, completion rate formulas, mood tracking, and structured weekly reflections are all ready to go from day one.

No complex setup required. Follow the 3-step onboarding, add 3–5 habits, and start logging today. Built for intermediate Notion users who want a powerful system without building it from scratch.
features: 5 fully structured databases with pre-built relations, rollups, and formulas — track habits, daily logs, goals, streaks, and weekly reviews all in one place.
Automatic streak and 30-day completion rate calculations so you always know exactly how consistent you've been without any manual math.
Goal-to-habit linking connects every daily action to a bigger life goal, keeping you motivated when enthusiasm starts to fade.
Structured Weekly Review template prompts you to celebrate wins, identify obstacles, and set intentions — turning reflection into a 10-minute habit.
7 pre-configured pages including a Dashboard, Daily Check-In, Analytics view with calendar and timeline, and a beginner-friendly Setup Guide.

faq.q: Do I need to be a Notion expert to use this template?
faq.a: No — this template is designed for intermediate Notion users who are comfortable with databases but don't want to build everything from scratch. A detailed Setup Guide and Getting Started checklist are included so you can be up and running in under 15 minutes.

faq.q: Can I use this on mobile for quick daily logging?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Daily Check-In page is designed for fast, low-friction logging on mobile — just open the page, check off your habits, and you're done in under a minute. The full analytics and setup features are best explored on desktop.

faq.q: What happens after I purchase? How do I get the template?
faq.a: After purchase you'll receive a Notion template link. Click it, select 'Duplicate' in Notion, and the entire workspace — all databases, pages, formulas, and views — will be copied directly into your Notion account. No additional software required.
